2026-03-10.lessons:
Thinking to have 2 entries at a trade with one TP at 1R so i can cover the other trade if SL hit.
===========================
Learned from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E5EBc1MtiXQ :
Basically it is Liquidity sweep on LTF 5mins, some people says also works for 30mins.
the rules is :
1. Follow the trend
2. "The liquidity" meaning if uptrend then it is the last swing L, this last swing must be near with the previous last swing L / Demand zone, when price sweep the liquidity from the last swing L it must hit the next Demand zone and must not close inside it, it would be invalid if price sweep the liquidity and retrace back without hitting the Demand zone hastely.
